name: RC Auxiliary Switch and Failsafe Configuration
description: You are an Agricultural Technician commissioning a new spray drone. The ArduPilot auxiliary channels and throttle failsafe are currently at unsafe factory defaults. Configure the RC7_OPTION, RC8_OPTION, RC9_OPTION, RC10_OPTION, FS_THR_ENABLE, FS_THR_VALUE, and PILOT_THR_FILT parameters using the values specified in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/transmitter_mapping.txt. These changes should take effect without rebooting the vehicle.
